findings.evidence: `rg` hits: existing `SubgroupFiberOrbitQuotientGroup.lean:404:lemma subgroupFiberOrbitClass_eq_iff_quotientGroup_mk_inv_eq`, with RHS `QuotientGroup.mk (s := H) φ⁻¹ = QuotientGroup.mk (s := H) ψ⁻¹`; new lines 433, 449, 458, and 468 explicitly derive/forward the added lemmas from that criterion. Mathlib has the needed coset criterion at `GroupTheory/Coset/Defs.lean:198:protected theorem eq`.
findings.fix: Do not add this parallel API; use `subgroupFiberOrbitClass_eq_iff_quotientGroup_mk_inv_eq H e φ 1` plus `QuotientGroup.eq`/`simp` at call sites, or justify a single more general reusable lemma instead of four wrappers.
findings.issue: `subgroupFiberOrbitClass_smul_eq_base_iff` and its regular/reversed variants at lines 443, 454, and 462 duplicate the `ψ = 1` specialization of the existing quotient-group class-equality API.

summary: The new declarations are all special-case wrappers around the existing arbitrary-subgroup fibre-orbit equality criterion, with regular and reversed-orientation variants forwarding to the same specialization.
